title: Inventory Snapshot Event
description: A periodic inventory snapshot from Aurora MySQL. Captures SKU-level stock status for a store at a point in time.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this snapshot event (UUID).

event_ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this snapshot was captured.

sku_count.description: Total number of tracked SKUs in the store.

in_stock_sku_count.description: Number of SKUs with available stock greater than zero.

low_stock_sku_count.description: Number of SKUs with stock below the reorder threshold.

stockout_sku_count.description: Number of SKUs with zero available stock.
